data.script_preview:
Observed directory listing on /ftp/ endpoint.

GET /ftp/ returns HTTP 200 with an HTML directory listing showing files including:
- acquisitions.md
- legal.md
- quarantine/ (subdirectory)

Also /ftp/quarantine/ directory listing returns the contents of that subdirectory.

This exposes file inventory to unauthenticated attackers and aids in path traversal exploitation.
